onboarding.title: Onboarding Guide
onboarding.description: This site is a desktop OS-style portfolio. Try running various apps from the dock or menu.
onboarding.revisitDescription: You've already seen the guide. Would you like to watch it again?

1.title: Desktop Interface
1.content: This project reproduces a Linux desktop environment on desktop and an Android-like mobile environment on mobile.

2.title: Applications
2.content:
You can launch various functions through the
**top-left menu** and the **bottom dock**.

3.title: Using Terminal
3.content:
The terminal works mainly with predefined commands.
Try entering 'whoami', 'browser', 'blackjack' to see my projects.

4.title: System Panel
4.content:
The top-right panel includes a clock, calendar, weather info,
and system settings like color temperature.

5.title: Video Player
5.content:
A multimedia app where you can watch videos
featuring my activities or works.

6.title: Mail App
6.content:
A mailing application where you can leave a
message to contact me directly.

7.title: Web Browser
7.content:
Explore my full portfolio site through
the browser-style application.

8.title: Text Viewer
8.content:
A tool for viewing detailed introductions
or code snippets in text format.

1.title: Mobile Interface
1.content: This project reproduces a Linux desktop environment on desktop and an Android-like mobile environment on mobile.

2.title: Launching Apps
2.content: Touch the **icons** on the Home screen to launch various features like Terminal, Browser, and Games.

3.title: App Switching
3.content: Press the **middle button** on the bottom bar to quickly switch between or close currently running apps.

4.title: Go to Home
4.content: Press the **left home button** on the bottom bar to return to the Home screen at any time.

5.title: Using Terminal
5.content: Check out my projects by typing commands like 'whoami' and 'browser' in the terminal.
